security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://*.googleapis.com https://*.firebaseio.com https://*.firebaseapp.com https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com https://securetoken.googleapis.com https://firestore.googleapis.com https://www.googleapis.com https://accounts.google.com https://api.github.com https://*.github.com https://trishteam.io.vn; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost https://*.googleusercontent.com https://www.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://accounts.google.com; script-src 'self' https://apis.google.com https://accounts.google.com https://www.gstatic.com; frame-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost https://trishteam-17c2d.firebaseapp.com https://accounts.google.com https://*.firebaseapp.com; object-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Ghi chú cá nhân + dự án có deadline
bundle.longDescription: TrishNote — note-taking app cho cá nhân và dự án. Hỗ trợ rich text (B/I/U + list), font Windows, đính kèm file/link, đặt deadline + tasks, ghim Lối tắt. Per-UID local storage + Firebase Auth.
